grant_and_term.license_type: Non-exclusive license to use the System at a specified location
grant_and_term.renewal: NONE. No right to renew or extend. Re-licensing at sole discretion with potentially materially different terms.
grant_and_term.hits_agreement_term: Concurrent with Franchise Agreement; auto-terminates on FA expiration/termination

fee_and_payment.monthly_royalty: 5% GRR, payable by 15th of following month
fee_and_payment.monthly_program_fee: 4% GRR (may increase up to +1% over term)
fee_and_payment.electronic_funds_transfer: May be required; franchisee bears all costs
fee_and_payment.offset_rights: Franchisor may reduce any payment/credit by amounts owed across affiliates
fee_and_payment.insurance_casualty_fees: During business interruption, monthly fees based on forecasted GRR agreed with insurer; franchisor participates in insurance negotiations

site_and_construction.auto_extensions: 30-day rolling extensions for new dev/conversion without fee, until 60 days' notice given
site_and_construction.plans_approval: Must obtain written consent before commencing any renovation work
site_and_construction.architect_approval: Must obtain prior written consent for architect, designer, general contractor, major subcontractors
site_and_construction.ada_certification: Required at construction start and before opening

training_obligations.pre_opening: GM and key personnel must complete required training programs
training_obligations.ongoing: Replacements must complete appropriate training; all staff must complete Brand Learning Programs
training_obligations.onq_certification: Must pass 80% test; hotel opening may be delayed if staff fails
training_obligations.brand_conference: GM and Dir Sales required to attend annually ($3,000/attendee)
training_obligations.forbes_travel_guide: GM and dept heads required to complete 2-day annual training ($12,000/year)
training_obligations.luxury_leader: Mandatory for all new GMs (60 hours, $1,000 + travel)
training_obligations.annual_compliance: 2-3 hours/year for all staff (harassment, trafficking, cyber, diversity)

operational_obligations.24_7_operation: Must operate 24/7 except as permitted for special circumstances
operational_obligations.management_approval: Must use franchisor-approved management company if deemed unqualified
operational_obligations.management_replacement: 90 days to find replacement if management company departs or becomes unsuitable
operational_obligations.rate_parity: May be required to maintain rate parity across distribution channels
operational_obligations.reservation_service: Must use exclusively for outbound referrals
operational_obligations.mandatory_guest_fees: Must obtain franchisor consent for any MGF; subject to Standards
operational_obligations.renovation_cycles: Must comply with FRCM renovation schedules and all Standards updates

non_curable_defaults: Pattern of same non-compliance within 24 months (even if cured each time)
3 default notices in any 12 months (regardless of cure)
Failure to operate 5+ consecutive days (except force majeure with reasonable steps)
Contest of System ownership or Mark validity
Termination of any other Hotel Agreement
Failure to construct shared facilities after consent withdrawal
interim_remedies: Revoke financial accommodations (fee discounts, ramps, waivers)

coo_transfer_requirements: Resolve pending suits or provide security

noncompete.during_term: Cannot own or be licensor/franchisor of competing brand. May be franchisee, manage (if not exclusive manager), or hold minority interest in competitor.
noncompete.management_company: Cannot be exclusive manager for a Competitor; 90 days to replace if becomes Competitor
noncompete.competitor_definition: Any individual/entity that owns, licenses, or franchises a Competing Brand (regardless of number of hotels)

guaranty_scope.guarantors_determined_by: Review of financial information submitted with Application
guaranty_scope.scope: Certain of Franchisee's obligations under the Franchise Agreement

liquidated_damages.pre_opening_no_work: $25,000 x rooms (if new hotel at site within 1 year)
liquidated_damages.post_opening_before_2yr: Greater of (avg monthly royalty x 60) or ($25,000 x rooms)
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Avg monthly royalty x remaining months
liquidated_damages.state_overrides: MN and ND delete liquidated damages. CA may limit enforceability.

venue_and_dispute.forum: ED Virginia (Alexandria) or Fairfax County VA state court or NY NY
venue_and_dispute.arbitration: None (except Puerto Rico: AAA/JAMS, venue Fairfax VA, seat NY)
venue_and_dispute.jury_trial_waiver: Not explicitly stated in standard FA

state_overrides.california: NY governing law and VA venue may be unenforceable
state_overrides.illinois: IL Franchise Disclosure Act governs for IL licensees
state_overrides.maryland: May sue in MD for MD franchise law claims
state_overrides.minnesota: Out-of-state litigation, jury waiver, liquidated damages prohibited
state_overrides.north_dakota: Out-of-state venue deleted; ND law governs; jury waiver deleted
state_overrides.rhode_island: Out-of-state venue and non-RI law void for RI Act claims
state_overrides.washington: WA law prevails in conflicts; arbitration/mediation site in WA or mutually agreed

insurance_requirements.requirement: Must maintain minimum levels and types per Manual
insurance_requirements.insurer_ratings: Minimum ratings as specified in Manual
insurance_requirements.franchisor_remedy: If franchisee fails to obtain/maintain, franchisor may obtain at franchisee's expense

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must indemnify and defend franchisor, Hilton Worldwide, all subsidiaries/affiliates, and their officers/directors/employees/agents/successors/assigns
indemnification.trigger: Any claim, demand, tax, penalty, or judicial/administrative proceeding arising from any claimed occurrence at Hotel

data_ownership.post_term_use: Franchisee may not use after term except as expressly permitted
data_ownership.franchisee_data: Franchisee retains info about itself and its affiliates/officers/directors
data_ownership.fpr_usage_right: Franchisor may use information for financial performance representations in future FDDs

distinctive_clauses.description: Must install luxury spa; third-party spa brand requires written approval
Must participate in FTG rating program ($22,400/year), including on-site training and quality assessment
Must use franchisor-approved consultant for trade name, visual identity, strategic brand positioning
Any entity that owns/licenses/franchises a competing brand, regardless of size. Uniquely broad — even single-hotel brands qualify.
Franchise is entirely non-renewable. Re-licensing at sole discretion only. Materially different terms may apply.
Same non-compliance within 24 months is non-curable even if cured after each notice. Very aggressive.
